SEARCH

Package View.RunLogic

package View.RunLogic
Contains the graphical user interface (GUI) components of the application.

This package includes classes responsible for logging in as a specific user, setting up the GUI and actually executing the program so that the GUI can be displayed to the user and handle user interactions. It communicates with CRUDLogic, which handles all of the logic for implementing button functionality.

It is designed to communicate with the Business Logic Layer (BLL) to fetch or modify data and then display the data in a user-friendly manner.

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CustomMenuBar
    CustomMenuBar is a custom implementation of a JMenuBar with a maroon background to match the application's theme.
    GUIBuilder
    GUIBuilder is responsible for setting up the main frame of the application and initializing the graphical user interface (GUI) components.
    GUIExecute
    The GUIExecute class is responsible for managing the application startup process, including handling the login procedure and launching the main application GUI.
    GUISetup
    GUISetup is responsible for setting up the graphical user interface (GUI) for the application.
    LoginWindow
    A GUI for user login to access the Pokémon Database.
